data.body: Refactor apply_step_transition in app/helpers.rs to append completion records instead of mutating active records. Add supersedes_id field. Refactor annotate_step_history similarly. Update is_active() to check for superseding records. Add reject_record_mutation guard and ImmutableRecordViolation error variant.
data.title: WP2: Immutability enforcement — append-only step history, mutation guards
